dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped 10-period channel breakout to Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) which represent high/low bands over a lookback period. Entry requires price breakout beyond channel boundary with confirmation on next candle (prev_high/prev_low comparison). Exit when price reverts to channel middle. Direction is context-dependent: long entries when breaking above, short entries when breaking below. No volume filter applied per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped 10-period channel breakout to Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) which represent high/low bands over a lookback period. Entry requires price breakout beyond channel boundary with confirmation on next candle (prev_high/prev_low comparison). Exit when price reverts to channel middle. Direction is context-dependent: long entries when breaking above, short entries when breaking below. No volume filter applied per signal specification.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter positions when a channel breakout operator (CBO) identifies a trend direction in the price series with sufficient timeliness to generate profits.
